Translation mostly clear. A few gaps.
I am a healer, not a mechanic, and I worry about my young ones here
But if you are truly in distress, I can certainly look at what I can. Perhap
I can offer some insight, though.
Ask Xochi what is the most efficient way to acquire the required
Xochi appears highly cooperative. Trust is strong.
Tip: Xochi trusts you enough to escort. Type 'escort' to ask.
Companions help with repairs at the Crash Site.
